title: Dates on a Plane
description: What if you only had one flight to meet and marry your soulmate? But, there’s a twist. If you don’t fall in love, you have to fall out of the plane.
quote: You are now free to move about the cabin, and find the love of your life.
altHero: pilot holding a glass of champagne
alt1: line of people going up stairs to a plane
alt2: tall woman twirling her hair and holding a suitcase, talking to a short guy
alt3: an enthusiastic guy talking to another guy
alt4: guy being kicked out of the airplane with a parachute on
